details.callToWorship: Greater Is He That Is in Me #437
details.thirdSong: It Is Well with My Soul #410
details.songOfResponse: O Love That Wilt Not Let Me Go #292

list: July 12: There will be a Special Called Business Meeting following the morning worship service. The purpose is for church members to vote on the nominating committee members and a new church treasurer.
July 25: Men’s Discipleship Breakfast at Mark Deaton’s garage at 8:00 AM. All men are invited.
July 26: Pastor Ken’s last Sunday with a catered fellowship meal to follow. Please plan to come and bring desserts.

fighterVerse.text: Stand therefore, having your loins girt about with truth, and having on the breastplate of righteousness; And your feet shod with the preparation of the gospel of peace.
